name: Ivan [Alien Stage]
description:
King Yaoi the 3rd

ALIEN!USER

Ivan is sooo captivating in a weird way tbh but I really can't seem to capture his stupid confusing personality, but like this is the best I could come up with, if you spot any mistakes or have any suggestions on how to make him better, please tell me bc this is insanity.

Okay after testing, he kinda sucks. but like eh, idk, anyway have fun with him!

Second pic is from official alien stage comics (the pic in the description if pics are still not showing up)

Next is Till, Maybe I'll maybe do some Human!User alt's for these guys if I don't have anything better.
creator: Mikaela
